<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>BookNexa AI — Social Media Management</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
:root {
  --black: #0a0a0a;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --cream: #faf9f7;
  --muted: #6b6459;
  --border: #e8e4de;
  --grad: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff);
}
body {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--black);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* NAV */
nav {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-end;
  padding: 0 3rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--white);
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  overflow: visible;
}
.logo {
  position: relative;
  top: -10px;
  left: -20px;
}
.logo img {
  height: 160px;
  width: auto;
  mix-blend-mode: multiply;
}
.nav-cta {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 0.65rem 1.75rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-right: -30px;
  position: relative;
  top: -15px;
}

/* HERO */
.hero {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4rem;
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 7rem 2rem;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  text-align: left;
}
.hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.08;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.hero h1 .grad {
  background: var(--grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  font-style: italic;
}
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  max-width: 460px;
}
.hero-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.btn-secondary {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 2px;
}
.hero-photos {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.photo-card {
  border-radius: 4px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--cream);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.photo-card img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 180px;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
.photo-label {
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
}

/* TRUST BAR */
.trust-bar {
  background: var(--cream);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 1.25rem 5rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.trust-item {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}
.tdot {
  width: 5px; height: 5px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #00d4ff);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* SECTIONS */
section { padding: 6rem 2rem; }
.container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
.section-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.section-sub {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 300;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

/* HOW IT WORKS */
.how-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 4rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.how-step {
  padding: 2.5rem 1.75rem;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.how-step:last-child { border-right: none; }
.step-num {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 3rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  background: var(--grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  line-height: 1.3;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.1rem;
}
.how-step h3 {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.how-step p {
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* FREE TRIAL */
.trial-section {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 6rem 2rem;
}
.trial-section .section-title {
  color: var(--white);
  max-width: 680px;
  margin: 0 auto 1rem;
}
.trial-section .section-sub {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  max-width: 520px;
  margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
}
.trial-badges {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.trial-badge {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
}
.btn-grad {
  display: inline-block;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 1.1rem 3rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* PRICING */
.pricing-intro { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
.pricing-intro .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1rem; }
.pricing-intro .section-sub { margin: 0 auto; max-width: 500px; }
.pricing-grid-5 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.pricing-grid-3 { display: contents; }
.pricing-grid-2 { display: contents; }
.pricing-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
  position: relative;
  background: var(--white);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.pricing-card .features { flex: 1; }
.pricing-card.featured {
  border: 1.5px solid transparent;
  background: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box,
              linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff) border-box;
}
.pricing-card.elite {
  border: 1px solid #e8d5a3;
  background: #fefcf7;
}
.pricing-card.premier {
  border: 1px solid var(--black);
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
}
.pricing-card.premier .plan-mo,
.pricing-card.premier .plan-desc,
.pricing-card.premier .platforms-label,
.pricing-card.premier .platform,
.pricing-card.premier .features li { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }
.pricing-card.premier .plan-name { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }
.pricing-card.premier .plan-price { color: var(--white); }
.pricing-card.premier .features li { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.pricing-card.premier .plan-btn { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: var(--white); }
.popular {
  position: absolute;
  top: -13px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff);
  color: var(--white);
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.28rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 100px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.plan-name {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.plan-price {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.plan-price sup {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.plan-price .range { font-size: 1.8rem; }
.plan-mo {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-weight: 300;
}
.plan-desc {
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 300;
  font-style: italic;
  line-height: 1.6;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.pricing-card.premier .plan-desc { border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.platforms-label {
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.features { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.features li {
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  padding: 0.45rem 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--black);
  font-weight: 300;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.features li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.ck {
  width: 15px; height: 15px; min-width: 15px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #00d4ff);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 3px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.ck::after {
  content: '';
  width: 4px; height: 2.5px;
  border-left: 1.5px solid white;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid white;
  transform: rotate(-45deg) translateY(-1px);
}
.plan-btn {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.9rem;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 500;
  border: 1px solid var(--black);
  color: var(--black);
}
.plan-btn.grad-btn {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff);
  border: none;
  color: var(--white);
}

/* ADD-ONS */
.addons-section { background: var(--cream); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.addons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.addon-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.addon-card.featured {
  border: 1.5px solid transparent;
  background: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box,
              linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff) border-box;
}
.addon-card .features { flex: 1; }
.addon-name {
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.addon-price {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 2.8rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.addon-price sup {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  vertical-align: super;
}
.addon-mo { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1rem; font-weight: 300; }
.addon-best {
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-style: italic;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-weight: 300;
}
.adspend-note {
  background: var(--black);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  padding: 1.25rem 2rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.adspend-note strong { color: var(--white); font-weight: 500; }

/* FORM */
.form-section { text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.form-section .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1rem; max-width: 600px; }
.form-section .section-sub { margin: 0 auto 3rem; max-width: 500px; }
.form-box {
  max-width: 580px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 3rem;
  text-align: left;
}
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
.fg { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.4rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.fg label { font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }
.fg input, .fg select, .fg textarea {
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--white);
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--black);
  outline: none;
  border-radius: 2px;
  width: 100%;
}
.fg input:focus, .fg select:focus { border-color: #a855f7; }
.form-submit {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a855f7, #3b82f6, #00d4ff);
  color: var(--white);
  border: none;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
}
.form-note { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 1rem; text-align: center; font-weight: 300; }
.revision-note { text-align: center; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2rem; font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  background: var(--black);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
footer .grad-text {
  background: var(--grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
  .hero-photos { display: none; }
  .trust-bar { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .how-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .addons-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .form-box { padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="BookNexa AI">
  </div>
  <a href="#claim" class="nav-cta">Claim Free Trial</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div style="background:var(--white);">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Social Media Management</div>
      <h1>Your Business,<br><span class="grad">Always Visible.</span><br>Never Falling Behind.</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">We create and schedule professional social media content for your business every single day — so you can focus on what you do best.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#claim" class="btn-primary">Claim 14 Days Free</a>
        <a href="#pricing" class="btn-secondary">View Packages</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photos">
      <div class="photo-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
      </div>
      <div class="photo-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
      </div>
      <div class="photo-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
      </div>
      <div class="photo-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TRUST BAR -->
<div class="trust-bar">
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="tdot"></span> No credit card required</div>
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="tdot"></span> No long-term contracts</div>
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="tdot"></span> Results in 24–48 hours</div>
  <div class="trust-item"><span class="tdot"></span> Cancel anytime</div>
</div>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">How It Works</div>
    <div class="section-title">Four simple steps to get started</div>
    <p class="section-sub" style="max-width:520px;">No contracts. No long onboarding. Just consistent, professional content that keeps your brand active and growing.</p>
    <div class="how-grid">
      <div class="how-step">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <h3>Claim Your Trial</h3>
        <p>Fill out our quick form and we get to work creating 14 days of custom content for your business — completely free.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="how-step">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <h3>We Create Your Content</h3>
        <p>Our team crafts 14 days of professional posts tailored to your brand voice, industry, and target audience.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="how-step">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <h3>Review & Approve</h3>
        <p>You receive a preview of your complete content calendar. Review everything before anything goes live.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="how-step">
        <div class="step-num">04</div>
        <h3>We Go Live</h3>
        <p>We send you a secure link to connect your accounts. Once connected, we handle all scheduling and publishing from there.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FREE TRIAL BANNER -->
<div class="trial-section">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Limited Time Offer</div>
  <h2 class="section-title" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;">Get 14 days of professional content — completely free</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">We create your first two weeks of social media posts at no cost. No credit card. No obligation to continue.</p>
  <div class="trial-badges">
    <div class="trial-badge"><span class="tdot"></span> No credit card required</div>
    <div class="trial-badge"><span class="tdot"></span> No contracts</div>
    <div class="trial-badge"><span class="tdot"></span> Cancel anytime</div>
    <div class="trial-badge"><span class="tdot"></span> Delivered in 24–48 hours</div>
  </div>
  <a href="#claim" class="btn-grad">Start My Free Trial</a>
</div>

<!-- PRICING -->
<section id="pricing">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pricing-intro">
      <div class="section-eyebrow">Pricing</div>
      <div class="section-title">Simple, transparent packages</div>
      <p class="section-sub">Choose the plan that fits your business. No long-term contracts — upgrade or cancel anytime.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pricing-grid-5">
      <div class="pricing-card">
        <div class="plan-name">Starter</div>
        <div class="plan-price"><sup>$</sup>497</div>
        <div class="plan-mo">per month</div>
        <div class="plan-desc">Consistent visibility, professionally managed</div>
        <div class="platforms-label">1 Platform</div>
        <ul class="features">
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Up to 20 posts/month</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Custom captions</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> 1 social account</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Branded visuals</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Scheduling &amp; publishing</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Hashtag optimization</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> 2 revisions/month</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="#claim" class="plan-btn">Get Started</a>
      </div>
      <div class="pricing-card featured">
        <div class="popular">Most Popular</div>
        <div class="plan-name">Growth</div>
        <div class="plan-price"><sup>$</sup>997</div>
        <div class="plan-mo">per month</div>
        <div class="plan-desc">Stronger presence + multi-platform visibility</div>
        <div class="platforms-label">Up to 2 Platforms</div>
        <ul class="features">
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Up to 24 posts/month</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Caption strategy</li>
          <li><span class="ck"></span> Up to 2 accounts</li>

<!-- CLAIM FORM -->
<section class="form-section" id="claim">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Get Started</div>
    <div class="section-title">Claim your 14-day free trial</div>
    <p class="section-sub">Fill out the form below and we'll deliver your first 14 days of content within 24–48 hours. No credit card needed.</p>
    <div class="form-box">
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="fg"><label>First Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Jane"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label>Last Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Smith"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Business Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Your Business Name"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Business Email</label><input type="email" placeholder="jane@yourbusiness.com"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Industry</label><input type="text" placeholder="Enter your industry"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label>Website URL</label><input type="url" placeholder="https://yourbusiness.com"></div>
      <div class="fg">
        <label>Package Interest</label>
        <select>
          <option value="">Select a package</option>
          <option>Starter — $497/month</option>
          <option>Growth — $997/month</option>
          <option>Premium — $1,497/month</option>
          <option>Elite — $2,500–$3,500/month</option>
          <option>Premier — $5,000–$6,000/month</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <button class="form-submit">Claim My Free 14 Days</button>
      <p class="form-note">No credit card required. No contracts. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
